message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="team-lead" summary="Test-agent for T5 Task CRUD API">
You are test-agent for task T5: M2 — Task CRUD API.

INPUT (Read these files FIRST):
- Task: Build TaskService, TaskController, TaskRequest DTO, PageResponse DTO.
  Acceptance criteria (M2 AC1-AC16):
  - AC1: POST /api/tasks with valid data + token → 201 with full task (id, createdBy from JWT, createdAt)
  - AC2: No priority → default MEDIUM
  - AC3: No title or empty → 400
  - AC4: GET /api/tasks/{id} existing → 200
  - AC5: GET /api/tasks/{id} non-existing → 404
  - AC6: PUT /api/tasks/{id} → 200 with updatedAt set
  - AC7: DELETE /api/tasks/{id} → 204 (soft delete)
  - AC8: Soft-deleted tasks excluded from GET /api/tasks list
  - AC9: GET /api/tasks/{id} for soft-deleted → 404
  - AC10: GET /api/tasks default → page=0, size=20, sort=createdAt desc
  - AC11: GET /api/tasks?keyword=xxx → title contains (case-insensitive)
  - AC12: GET /api/tasks?priority=HIGH → only HIGH tasks
  - AC13: GET /api/tasks?page=1&size=5 → correct second page
  - AC14: No token → 401
  - AC15: title >200 chars → 400
  - AC16: description >5000 chars → 400
- PLAN: C:/Users/a0304/IdeaProjects/TouchFish-DevTeam/docs/dev-team/2026-03-09-E3/2026-03-09-PLAN.md
- CONTRACT: C:/Users/a0304/IdeaProjects/TouchFish-DevTeam/docs/dev-team/2026-03-09-E3/2026-03-09-CONTRACT.md
- READONLY context (read all):
  - C:/Users/a0304/IdeaProjects/TouchFish-DevTeam/taskflow/backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/entity/Task.java
  - C:/Users/a0304/IdeaProjects/TouchFish-DevTeam/taskflow/backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/entity/TaskStatus.java
  - C:/Users/a0304/IdeaProjects/TouchFish-DevTeam/taskflow/backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/repository/TaskRepository.java
  - C:/Users/a0304/IdeaProjects/TouchFish-DevTeam/taskflow/backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/dto/TaskResponse.java
  - C:/Users/a0304/IdeaProjects/TouchFish-DevTeam/taskflow/backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/security/JwtUtil.java
  - C:/Users/a0304/IdeaProjects/TouchFish-DevTeam/taskflow/backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/exception/GlobalExceptionHandler.java
  - C:/Users/a0304/IdeaProjects/TouchFish-DevTeam/taskflow/backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/exception/ResourceNotFoundException.java
  - C:/Users/a0304/IdeaProjects/TouchFish-DevTeam/taskflow/backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/controller/AuthController.java
- Test directory: C:/Users/a0304/IdeaProjects/TouchFish-DevTeam/taskflow/backend/src/test/java/com/taskflow/
- Log output: C:/Users/a0304/IdeaProjects/TouchFish-DevTeam/docs/dev-team/2026-03-09-E3/logs/test-agent-5.log.md

YOUR JOB: Design and write tests. Use @SpringBootTest + @AutoConfigureMockMvc.
For authenticated requests: register a user, login to get JWT, then use token in Authorization header.
Use helper methods to avoid repetition.

IMPLEMENTATION NOTES: Write to C:/Users/a0304/IdeaProjects/TouchFish-DevTeam/docs/dev-team/2026-03-09-E3/temp/impl-notes-5.md

OUTPUT:
- Write test file(s)
- Run: cd C:/Users/a0304/IdeaProjects/TouchFish-DevTeam/taskflow/backend && mvn test -Dtest="TaskControllerTest" -pl .
- Fix compile errors
- Return: test file paths + count

Write output to C:/Users/a0304/IdeaProjects/TouchFish-DevTeam/docs/dev-team/2026-03-09-E3/temp/test-agent-5-output.md
</teammate-message>

content.content:
1→[SECTION] Project Overview
     2→[GOAL] Implement TaskFlow backend (Auth+CRUD+StateMachine) and frontend (TaskListPage) as a Spring Boot 3 + Vue 3 full-stack app
     3→[ARCH] Spring Boot 3.2.3 + H2 in-memory | Spring Security + JWT (jjwt 0.12.5) | Vue 3 + Pinia + Vue Router + Axios | Vitest + jsdom for frontend tests | spring-boot-starter-test for backend tests
     4→[NAMING] Java: camelCase fields, PascalCase classes, package com.taskflow.{layer} | Vue: PascalCase components, camelCase props/methods | DTO suffix for data transfer objects (e.g. TaskResponse, RegisterRequest)
     5→[CONSTRAINTS] Max 5 ALLOWED files per task | Soft-delete for tasks (deleted=true) | JWT 24h expiry | No M4/M5 — assignee shows "未指派", tags empty | H2 create-drop (no migrations)
     6→[SHARED] taskflow/backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/entity/Task.java | taskflow/backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/entity/TaskStatus.java | taskflow/backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/config/SecurityConfig.java
     7→
     8→[SECTION] Standards
     9→[SOURCE] none
    10→[OVERRIDE] follow-actual-code | SecurityConfig already exists with JwtAuthenticationFilter import
    11→
    12→[SECTION] Specs
    13→[SPEC] id=S1 | name=M1-Authentication | path=taskflow/docs/specs/M1-auth.md
    14→[SPEC] id=S2 | name=M2-Task-CRUD | path=taskflow/docs/specs/M2-task-crud.md
    15→[SPEC] id=S3 | name=M3-Task-State-Machine | path=taskflow/docs/specs/M3-task-state-machine.md
    16→[SPEC] id=S4 | name=M6-Task-List-Page | path=taskflow/docs/specs/M6-task-list-page.md
    17→
    18→[SECTION] Cross-Cutting Concerns
    19→[CROSS-CUTTING] error-format: {message:string, timestamp:ISO8601} via GlobalExceptionHandler | auth: JWT Bearer token in Authorization header, userId extracted from token claims | password: bcrypt via PasswordEncoder bean | soft-delete: Task.deleted=true, all queries exclude deleted | pagination: PageResponse{content,page,size,totalElements,totalPages} | status-colors: TODO=#6B7280 IN_PROGRESS=#3B82F6 DONE=#10B981 CLOSED=#EF4444 | priority-colors: HIGH=#EF4444 MEDIUM=#F59E0B LOW=#10B981
    20→
    21→[SECTION] Tasks
    22→[TASK] id=T1 | name=M1 — User Entity + Auth DTOs | spec=S1 | deps=none | files=5 | complexity=LOW | reason=pure entity+DTO, no logic
    23→[TASK] id=T2 | name=M1 — JWT Security Infrastructure | spec=S1 | deps=none | files=3 | complexity=LOW | reason=standalone JWT util+filter, no cross-module
    24→[TASK] id=T3 | name=M1 — Auth Service + Controller + Error Handling | spec=S1 | deps=T1,T2 | files=5 | complexity=MED | reason=auth logic with security integration, cross-module deps
    25→[TASK] id=T4 | name=M2 — Task Entity + Repository | spec=S2,S3 | deps=none | files=4 | complexity=LOW | reason=pure entity+repo+enum, no logic
    26→[TASK] id=T5 | name=M2 — Task CRUD API | spec=S2 | deps=T3,T4 | files=4 | complexity=MED | reason=CRUD with pagination+filtering, auth integration
    27→[TASK] id=T6 | name=M3 — Task State Machine | spec=S3 | deps=T3,T4 | files=4 | complexity=LOW | reason=simple state transition logic, few files
    28→[TASK] id=T7 | name=M6 — Frontend Infrastructure + Store | spec=S4 | deps=none | files=5 | complexity=HIGH | reason=Pinia store+axios+router, complex mocking in tests
    29→[TASK] id=T8 | name=M6 — Frontend Task List Components | spec=S4 | deps=T7 | files=5 | complexity=HIGH | reason=5 Vue components, jsdom+vue-test-utils mocking
    30→
    31→[SECTION] Task Dependency Graph
    32→[DEP] T1, T2, T4 (parallel) → T3 | T3 + T4 → T5, T6 (parallel) | T7 → T8
    33→[WAVE] 1a=T1,T2,T4 | 1b=T7 | 2=T3 | 3a=T5,T6 | 3b=T8
    34→

file.content:
[SECTION] Project Overview
[GOAL] Implement TaskFlow backend (Auth+CRUD+StateMachine) and frontend (TaskListPage) as a Spring Boot 3 + Vue 3 full-stack app
[ARCH] Spring Boot 3.2.3 + H2 in-memory | Spring Security + JWT (jjwt 0.12.5) | Vue 3 + Pinia + Vue Router + Axios | Vitest + jsdom for frontend tests | spring-boot-starter-test for backend tests
[NAMING] Java: camelCase fields, PascalCase classes, package com.taskflow.{layer} | Vue: PascalCase components, camelCase props/methods | DTO suffix for data transfer objects (e.g. TaskResponse, RegisterRequest)
[CONSTRAINTS] Max 5 ALLOWED files per task | Soft-delete for tasks (deleted=true) | JWT 24h expiry | No M4/M5 — assignee shows "未指派", tags empty | H2 create-drop (no migrations)
[SHARED] taskflow/backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/entity/Task.java | taskflow/backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/entity/TaskStatus.java | taskflow/backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/config/SecurityConfig.java

[SECTION] Standards
[SOURCE] none
[OVERRIDE] follow-actual-code | SecurityConfig already exists with JwtAuthenticationFilter import

[SECTION] Specs
[SPEC] id=S1 | name=M1-Authentication | path=taskflow/docs/specs/M1-auth.md
[SPEC] id=S2 | name=M2-Task-CRUD | path=taskflow/docs/specs/M2-task-crud.md
[SPEC] id=S3 | name=M3-Task-State-Machine | path=taskflow/docs/specs/M3-task-state-machine.md
[SPEC] id=S4 | name=M6-Task-List-Page | path=taskflow/docs/specs/M6-task-list-page.md

[SECTION] Cross-Cutting Concerns
[CROSS-CUTTING] error-format: {message:string, timestamp:ISO8601} via GlobalExceptionHandler | auth: JWT Bearer token in Authorization header, userId extracted from token claims | password: bcrypt via PasswordEncoder bean | soft-delete: Task.deleted=true, all queries exclude deleted | pagination: PageResponse{content,page,size,totalElements,totalPages} | status-colors: TODO=#6B7280 IN_PROGRESS=#3B82F6 DONE=#10B981 CLOSED=#EF4444 | priority-colors: HIGH=#EF4444 MEDIUM=#F59E0B LOW=#10B981

[SECTION] Tasks
[TASK] id=T1 | name=M1 — User Entity + Auth DTOs | spec=S1 | deps=none | files=5 | complexity=LOW | reason=pure entity+DTO, no logic
[TASK] id=T2 | name=M1 — JWT Security Infrastructure | spec=S1 | deps=none | files=3 | complexity=LOW | reason=standalone JWT util+filter, no cross-module
[TASK] id=T3 | name=M1 — Auth Service + Controller + Error Handling | spec=S1 | deps=T1,T2 | files=5 | complexity=MED | reason=auth logic with security integration, cross-module deps
[TASK] id=T4 | name=M2 — Task Entity + Repository | spec=S2,S3 | deps=none | files=4 | complexity=LOW | reason=pure entity+repo+enum, no logic
[TASK] id=T5 | name=M2 — Task CRUD API | spec=S2 | deps=T3,T4 | files=4 | complexity=MED | reason=CRUD with pagination+filtering, auth integration
[TASK] id=T6 | name=M3 — Task State Machine | spec=S3 | deps=T3,T4 | files=4 | complexity=LOW | reason=simple state transition logic, few files
[TASK] id=T7 | name=M6 — Frontend Infrastructure + Store | spec=S4 | deps=none | files=5 | complexity=HIGH | reason=Pinia store+axios+router, complex mocking in tests
[TASK] id=T8 | name=M6 — Frontend Task List Components | spec=S4 | deps=T7 | files=5 | complexity=HIGH | reason=5 Vue components, jsdom+vue-test-utils mocking

[SECTION] Task Dependency Graph
[DEP] T1, T2, T4 (parallel) → T3 | T3 + T4 → T5, T6 (parallel) | T7 → T8
[WAVE] 1a=T1,T2,T4 | 1b=T7 | 2=T3 | 3a=T5,T6 | 3b=T8

1→[SECTION] API Contract
     2→[VERSION] 1
     3→
     4→[ENDPOINT] method=POST | path=/api/auth/register | req={username:string(3-50,alphanumeric+underscore),password:string(min8),displayName:string(1-100)} | res={id:long,username:string,displayName:string} | errors=400,409
     5→[ENDPOINT] method=POST | path=/api/auth/login | req={username:string,password:string} | res={token:string,expiresIn:number(86400)} | errors=401
     6→[ENDPOINT] method=GET | path=/api/auth/me | req=none(Authorization:Bearer) | res={id:long,username:string,displayName:string} | errors=401
     7→[ENDPOINT] method=POST | path=/api/tasks | req={title:string(1-200,required),description:string(max5000,optional),priority:enum(HIGH|MEDIUM|LOW,optional,default:MEDIUM)} | res=TaskResponse(201) | errors=400,401
     8→[ENDPOINT] method=GET | path=/api/tasks/{id} | req=none | res=TaskResponse | errors=401,404
     9→[ENDPOINT] method=PUT | path=/api/tasks/{id} | req={title:string(1-200,required),description:string(max5000,optional),priority:enum(HIGH|MEDIUM|LOW,optional)} | res=TaskResponse | errors=400,401,404
    10→[ENDPOINT] method=DELETE | path=/api/tasks/{id} | req=none | res=204-no-content | errors=401,404
    11→[ENDPOINT] method=GET | path=/api/tasks | req=query{page:int(0),size:int(20),sort:string(createdAt,desc),keyword:string,priority:enum} | res=PageResponse<TaskResponse> | errors=401
    12→[ENDPOINT] method=PATCH | path=/api/tasks/{id}/status | req={status:enum(TODO|IN_PROGRESS|DONE|CLOSED)} | res=TaskResponse | errors=400,401,404
    13→[ENDPOINT] method=GET | path=/api/tasks/{id}/transitions | req=none | res={currentStatus:enum,availableTransitions:enum[]} | errors=401,404
    14→
    15→[SECTION] Shared Types
    16→[TYPE] name=TaskResponse | fields=id:long,title:string,description:string,priority:enum(HIGH|MEDIUM|LOW),status:enum(TODO|IN_PROGRESS|DONE|CLOSED),createdBy:long,createdAt:ISO8601,updatedAt:ISO8601-or-null
    17→[TYPE] name=PageResponse | fields=content:array,page:int,size:int,totalElements:long,totalPages:int
    18→[TYPE] name=ErrorResponse | fields=message:string,timestamp:ISO8601
    19→
    20→[SECTION] Error Format
    21→[FORMAT] {message:string,timestamp:ISO8601} | 400=validation errors | 401=Unauthorized | 404=Resource not found | 409=Conflict(duplicate)
    22→
    23→[SECTION] Amendment Log
    24→

file.content:
[SECTION] API Contract
[VERSION] 1

[ENDPOINT] method=POST | path=/api/auth/register | req={username:string(3-50,alphanumeric+underscore),password:string(min8),displayName:string(1-100)} | res={id:long,username:string,displayName:string} | errors=400,409
[ENDPOINT] method=POST | path=/api/auth/login | req={username:string,password:string} | res={token:string,expiresIn:number(86400)} | errors=401
[ENDPOINT] method=GET | path=/api/auth/me | req=none(Authorization:Bearer) | res={id:long,username:string,displayName:string} | errors=401
[ENDPOINT] method=POST | path=/api/tasks | req={title:string(1-200,required),description:string(max5000,optional),priority:enum(HIGH|MEDIUM|LOW,optional,default:MEDIUM)} | res=TaskResponse(201) | errors=400,401
[ENDPOINT] method=GET | path=/api/tasks/{id} | req=none | res=TaskResponse | errors=401,404
[ENDPOINT] method=PUT | path=/api/tasks/{id} | req={title:string(1-200,required),description:string(max5000,optional),priority:enum(HIGH|MEDIUM|LOW,optional)} | res=TaskResponse | errors=400,401,404
[ENDPOINT] method=DELETE | path=/api/tasks/{id} | req=none | res=204-no-content | errors=401,404
[ENDPOINT] method=GET | path=/api/tasks | req=query{page:int(0),size:int(20),sort:string(createdAt,desc),keyword:string,priority:enum} | res=PageResponse<TaskResponse> | errors=401
[ENDPOINT] method=PATCH | path=/api/tasks/{id}/status | req={status:enum(TODO|IN_PROGRESS|DONE|CLOSED)} | res=TaskResponse | errors=400,401,404
[ENDPOINT] method=GET | path=/api/tasks/{id}/transitions | req=none | res={currentStatus:enum,availableTransitions:enum[]} | errors=401,404

[SECTION] Shared Types
[TYPE] name=TaskResponse | fields=id:long,title:string,description:string,priority:enum(HIGH|MEDIUM|LOW),status:enum(TODO|IN_PROGRESS|DONE|CLOSED),createdBy:long,createdAt:ISO8601,updatedAt:ISO8601-or-null
[TYPE] name=PageResponse | fields=content:array,page:int,size:int,totalElements:long,totalPages:int
[TYPE] name=ErrorResponse | fields=message:string,timestamp:ISO8601

[SECTION] Error Format
[FORMAT] {message:string,timestamp:ISO8601} | 400=validation errors | 401=Unauthorized | 404=Resource not found | 409=Conflict(duplicate)

[SECTION] Amendment Log

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<project xmlns="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0"
         xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance"
         xsi:schemaLocation="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0 https://maven.apache.org/xsd/maven-4.0.0.xsd">
    <modelVersion>4.0.0</modelVersion>

    <parent>
        <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId>
        <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-parent</artifactId>
        <version>3.2.3</version>
        <relativePath/>
    </parent>

    <groupId>com.taskflow</groupId>
    <artifactId>taskflow-backend</artifactId>
    <version>0.1.0</version>
    <name>taskflow-backend</name>
    <description>TaskFlow Backend - Spring Boot 3 + H2</description>

    <properties>
        <java.version>17</java.version>
        <jjwt.version>0.12.5</jjwt.version>
    </properties>

    <dependencies>
        <!-- Spring Boot Starters -->
        <dependency>
            <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId>
            <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-web</artifactId>
        </dependency>
        <dependency>
            <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId>
            <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-data-jpa</artifactId>
        </dependency>
        <dependency>
            <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId>
            <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-security</artifactId>
        </dependency>
        <dependency>
            <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId>
            <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-validation</artifactId>
        </dependency>

        <!-- H2 Database -->
        <dependency>
            <groupId>com.h2database</groupId>
            <artifactId>h2</artifactId>
            <scope>runtime</scope>
        </dependency>

        <!-- JWT -->
        <dependency>
            <groupId>io.jsonwebtoken</groupId>
            <artifactId>jjwt-api</artifactId>
            <version>${jjwt.version}</version>
        </dependency>
        <dependency>
            <groupId>io.jsonwebtoken</groupId>
            <artifactId>jjwt-impl</artifactId>
            <version>${jjwt.version}</version>
            <scope>runtime</scope>
        </dependency>
        <dependency>
            <groupId>io.jsonwebtoken</groupId>
            <artifactId>jjwt-jackson</artifactId>
            <version>${jjwt.version}</version>
            <scope>runtime</scope>
        </dependency>

        <!-- Testing -->
        <dependency>
            <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId>
            <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-test</artifactId>
            <scope>test</scope>
        </dependency>
        <dependency>
            <groupId>org.springframework.security</groupId>
            <artifactId>spring-security-test</artifactId>
            <scope>test</scope>
        </dependency>
    </dependencies>

    <build>
        <plugins>
            <plugin>
                <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId>
                <artifactId>spring-boot-maven-plugin</artifactId>
            </plugin>
        </plugins>
    </build>
</project>

input.content:
# Implementation Notes — T5: M2 Task CRUD API

## Test Design

### Dependencies
- Tests use `@SpringBootTest` + `@AutoConfigureMockMvc` (full integration tests)
- Auth: register user via direct repo save + login via `/api/auth/login` to get JWT token
- H2 in-memory database, `@Transactional` for test isolation

### Files Required by Implementation (not yet created)
1. `TaskRequest` DTO — with `@Valid` annotations: title (1-200, required), description (max 5000, optional), priority (optional, default MEDIUM)
2. `TaskService` — CRUD logic using TaskRepository, soft-delete, pagination/filtering
3. `TaskController` — REST endpoints at `/api/tasks`
4. `PageResponse` DTO — wrapper: content, page, size, totalElements, totalPages

### AC Coverage Map
| AC | Test Method | Description |
|----|-------------|-------------|
| AC1 | createTask_validData_returns201 | POST valid task -> 201 with id, createdBy, createdAt |
| AC2 | createTask_noPriority_defaultsMedium | No priority -> MEDIUM |
| AC3 | createTask_emptyTitle_returns400, createTask_noTitle_returns400 | Missing/empty title -> 400 |
| AC4 | getTask_existing_returns200 | GET by id -> 200 |
| AC5 | getTask_nonExisting_returns404 | GET non-existing id -> 404 |
| AC6 | updateTask_valid_returns200WithUpdatedAt | PUT -> 200 with updatedAt |
| AC7 | deleteTask_existing_returns204 | DELETE -> 204 soft delete |
| AC8 | listTasks_excludesSoftDeleted | GET list excludes deleted |
| AC9 | getTask_softDeleted_returns404 | GET soft-deleted -> 404 |
| AC10 | listTasks_defaultPagination | Default page=0, size=20, sort=createdAt desc |
| AC11 | listTasks_keywordFilter | keyword search case-insensitive |
| AC12 | listTasks_priorityFilter | priority=HIGH filter |
| AC13 | listTasks_pagination | page=1&size=5 correct second page |
| AC14 | createTask_noToken_returns401 | No auth -> 401 |
| AC15 | createTask_titleTooLong_returns400 | title >200 -> 400 |
| AC16 | createTask_descriptionTooLong_returns400 | description >5000 -> 400 |

### Key Design Decisions
- Helper method `registerAndGetToken()` follows AuthControllerTest pattern
- Helper method `createTaskJson()` builds JSON map for flexibility
- `@BeforeEach` clears both task and user repos for isolation
- Nested test classes group by feature: Create, Read, Update, Delete, List, Auth

# Implementation Notes — T5: M2 Task CRUD API

## Test Design

### Dependencies
- Tests use `@SpringBootTest` + `@AutoConfigureMockMvc` (full integration tests)
- Auth: register user via direct repo save + login via `/api/auth/login` to get JWT token
- H2 in-memory database, `@Transactional` for test isolation

### Files Required by Implementation (not yet created)
1. `TaskRequest` DTO — with `@Valid` annotations: title (1-200, required), description (max 5000, optional), priority (optional, default MEDIUM)
2. `TaskService` — CRUD logic using TaskRepository, soft-delete, pagination/filtering
3. `TaskController` — REST endpoints at `/api/tasks`
4. `PageResponse` DTO — wrapper: content, page, size, totalElements, totalPages

### AC Coverage Map
| AC | Test Method | Description |
|----|-------------|-------------|
| AC1 | createTask_validData_returns201 | POST valid task -> 201 with id, createdBy, createdAt |
| AC2 | createTask_noPriority_defaultsMedium | No priority -> MEDIUM |
| AC3 | createTask_emptyTitle_returns400, createTask_noTitle_returns400 | Missing/empty title -> 400 |
| AC4 | getTask_existing_returns200 | GET by id -> 200 |
| AC5 | getTask_nonExisting_returns404 | GET non-existing id -> 404 |
| AC6 | updateTask_valid_returns200WithUpdatedAt | PUT -> 200 with updatedAt |
| AC7 | deleteTask_existing_returns204 | DELETE -> 204 soft delete |
| AC8 | listTasks_excludesSoftDeleted | GET list excludes deleted |
| AC9 | getTask_softDeleted_returns404 | GET soft-deleted -> 404 |
| AC10 | listTasks_defaultPagination | Default page=0, size=20, sort=createdAt desc |
| AC11 | listTasks_keywordFilter | keyword search case-insensitive |
| AC12 | listTasks_priorityFilter | priority=HIGH filter |
| AC13 | listTasks_pagination | page=1&size=5 correct second page |
| AC14 | createTask_noToken_returns401 | No auth -> 401 |
| AC15 | createTask_titleTooLong_returns400 | title >200 -> 400 |
| AC16 | createTask_descriptionTooLong_returns400 | description >5000 -> 400 |

### Key Design Decisions
- Helper method `registerAndGetToken()` follows AuthControllerTest pattern
- Helper method `createTaskJson()` builds JSON map for flexibility
- `@BeforeEach` clears both task and user repos for isolation
- Nested test classes group by feature: Create, Read, Update, Delete, List, Auth

content.text:
Tests compile and run. All 28 tests executed, 21 failed (expected RED - endpoint doesn't exist yet so 404), 7 passed (the 401/no-token tests pass because security blocks unauthenticated requests, and `getTask_nonExisting_returns404` actually gets 404 but the JSON body doesn't match since there's no controller). This is the expected TDD RED state.

Now let me write the output file and send the results.

input.content:
# Test Agent 5 Output — T5: M2 Task CRUD API

## Test File
- `C:/Users/a0304/IdeaProjects/TouchFish-DevTeam/taskflow/backend/src/test/java/com/taskflow/controller/TaskControllerTest.java`

## Test Count: 28 tests

## AC Coverage
| AC | Tests | Status |
|----|-------|--------|
| AC1 | createTask_validData_returns201, createTask_createdByMatchesAuthUser | RED (404 — no controller) |
| AC2 | createTask_noPriority_defaultsMedium | RED |
| AC3 | createTask_emptyTitle_returns400, createTask_noTitle_returns400 | RED |
| AC4 | getTask_existing_returns200 | RED |
| AC5 | getTask_nonExisting_returns404 | RED (404 but no JSON body) |
| AC6 | updateTask_valid_returns200WithUpdatedAt, updateTask_nonExisting_returns404 | RED |
| AC7 | deleteTask_existing_returns204, deleteTask_nonExisting_returns404 | RED |
| AC8 | listTasks_excludesSoftDeleted | RED |
| AC9 | getTask_softDeleted_returns404 | RED |
| AC10 | listTasks_defaultPagination | RED |
| AC11 | listTasks_keywordFilter | RED |
| AC12 | listTasks_priorityFilter | RED |
| AC13 | listTasks_pagination | RED |
| AC14 | createTask_noToken_returns401, getTask_noToken_returns401, updateTask_noToken_returns401, deleteTask_noToken_returns401, listTasks_noToken_returns401 | GREEN (security blocks) |
| AC15 | createTask_titleTooLong_returns400, createTask_titleExact200_returns201, updateTask_titleTooLong_returns400 | RED |
| AC16 | createTask_descriptionTooLong_returns400, createTask_descriptionExact5000_returns201 | RED |
| Extra | listTasks_empty_returnsEmptyPage | RED |

## Run Result
- **28 tests total**, 21 FAIL (expected RED), 7 PASS (auth 401 tests + edge)
- All tests compile cleanly
- All failures are due to missing TaskController (returns 404)

## Implementation Requirements (for worker)
The tests expect these files to be created:
1. **TaskRequest** DTO — `@NotBlank @Size(max=200) title`, `@Size(max=5000) description`, `priority` (optional, default MEDIUM)
2. **PageResponse<T>** DTO — fields: `content` (List<T>), `page` (int), `size` (int), `totalElements` (long), `totalPages` (int)
3. **TaskService** — CRUD with soft-delete, pagination, keyword/priority filtering
4. **TaskController** — REST endpoints:
   - `POST /api/tasks` -> 201 (uses `@Valid @RequestBody TaskRequest`, sets createdBy from JWT)
   - `GET /api/tasks/{id}` -> 200 (excludes soft-deleted)
   - `PUT /api/tasks/{id}` -> 200 (uses `@Valid @RequestBody TaskRequest`)
   - `DELETE /api/tasks/{id}` -> 204 (soft delete)
   - `GET /api/tasks` -> 200 with PageResponse (params: keyword, priority, page, size)

| AC | Tests | Status |
|----|-------|--------|
| AC1 | createTask_validData_returns201, createTask_createdByMatchesAuthUser | RED (404 — no controller) |
| AC2 | createTask_noPriority_defaultsMedium | RED |
| AC3 | createTask_emptyTitle_returns400, createTask_noTitle_returns400 | RED |
| AC4 | getTask_existing_returns200 | RED |
| AC5 | getTask_nonExisting_returns404 | RED (404 but no JSON body) |
| AC6 | updateTask_valid_returns200WithUpdatedAt, updateTask_nonExisting_returns404 | RED |
| AC7 | deleteTask_existing_returns204, deleteTask_nonExisting_returns404 | RED |
| AC8 | listTasks_excludesSoftDeleted | RED |
| AC9 | getTask_softDeleted_returns404 | RED |
| AC10 | listTasks_defaultPagination | RED |
| AC11 | listTasks_keywordFilter | RED |
| AC12 | listTasks_priorityFilter | RED |
| AC13 | listTasks_pagination | RED |
| AC14 | createTask_noToken_returns401, getTask_noToken_returns401, updateTask_noToken_returns401, deleteTask_noToken_returns401, listTasks_noToken_returns401 | GREEN (security blocks) |
| AC15 | createTask_titleTooLong_returns400, createTask_titleExact200_returns201, updateTask_titleTooLong_returns400 | RED |
| AC16 | createTask_descriptionTooLong_returns400, createTask_descriptionExact5000_returns201 | RED |
| Extra | listTasks_empty_returnsEmptyPage | RED |

## Run Result
- **28 tests total**, 21 FAIL (expected RED), 7 PASS (auth 401 tests + edge)
- All tests compile cleanly
- All failures are due to missing TaskController (returns 404)

## Implementation Requirements (for worker)
The tests expect these files to be created:
1. **TaskRequest** DTO — `@NotBlank @Size(max=200) title`, `@Size(max=5000) description`, `priority` (optional, default MEDIUM)
2. **PageResponse<T>** DTO — fields: `content` (List<T>), `page` (int), `size` (int), `totalElements` (long), `totalPages` (int)
3. **TaskService** — CRUD with soft-delete, pagination, keyword/priority filtering
4. **TaskController** — REST endpoints:
   - `POST /api/tasks` -> 201 (uses `@Valid @RequestBody TaskRequest`, sets createdBy from JWT)
   - `GET /api/tasks/{id}` -> 200 (excludes soft-deleted)
   - `PUT /api/tasks/{id}` -> 200 (uses `@Valid @RequestBody TaskRequest`)
   - `DELETE /api/tasks/{id}` -> 204 (soft delete)
   - `GET /api/tasks` -> 200 with PageResponse (params: keyword, priority, page, size)
